title: ExperimentBundleOutput
description:
`experiment bundle` result (`--format json`): the emitted archive path, its
layout, the per-file sha256 ledger, and the `missing[]` ingredient ledger.

drift_detected.description:
`Some(true)` when the current spec drifted from the recorded snapshot,
`Some(false)` when it matched, `None` when drift could not be checked.

files.description: Every staged file with its sha256 (relative to the bundle root).

missing.description: Ingredients that could not be included, each with a human reason.

output.description: The archive path (tarball) or bundle directory that was written.

strict.description:
Whether `--strict` was requested (the command fails when any ingredient
is missing under strict mode).

ExperimentBundleFile.description: One staged bundle file with its content hash.

path.description: Path relative to the bundle root (e.g. `spec/compose.yaml`).

sha256.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 of the file's bytes.

ExperimentBundleMissing.description: One ingredient that was requested but could not be included in the bundle.

item.description: The bundle-relative path or logical item that is absent.

reason.description: A human-readable explanation of why it is absent.
